title: Neth Essentials
description: This texture pack, NethOP Essentials, will help you climb the ranks in Neth!
body:
A **NethOP TexturePack** to up your game in NethPot! Here’s what it changes:

### What does this pack change?  
- **Low Fire** – Smaller fire for better visibility.  
- **Low Shield** – Reduced shield size (in case you play HCFs).  
- **Small Items** – Food, XP bottles, and more with smaller models.  
- **Unobtrusive Particles** – Less obtrusive particles + No block particles.  
- **Smaller Totem Particles** – More compact and non-distracting effects.  
- **Armor Indicator** – [Showyy's]([https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/showy-durability+-overlay)) armor dura indicator (credits to her) CIT-RESEWN required

This pack is designed to enhance your performance in NethPot by providing **clearer visuals** and **better timing cues**. The low fire and shield make it easier to see your surroundings, while the small item sizes ensure you won’t be distracted by oversized icons. Non-obstructive particles keep your view clean. Download it now to gain a tactical advantage and excel in your NethPot gameplay!


**DISCLAIMER:** I didn’t create the smaller item models (also called Smaller Util). They were made by **Vanilla Tweaks**.  
**Credits:** [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
